name: Torinn Wyrmbane
sd_appearance: A towering Dragonborn clad in tattered grey cult robes, his scales an ominous crimson, stands at the center of a dimly lit chamber. His eyes, glowing with an eerie intensity, gaze upon the faithful gathered before him. A makeshift metal-banded staff adorns his right hand, while a hidden dagger is cleverly concealed within the folds of his robes. A single, distinctive visual detail sets him apart from the rest - a red, dragon-shaped brooch, glowing faintly, pinned to his chest, symbolizing his unwavering devotion to the Cult and their ultimate goal.
faction_visual: eclectic mix, deliberately no faction marks, one defining personal item
style_note: cult's grey wrappings, makeshift metal-banded staff, fervent expression
